hero.title: Connect equipment and manage your farm in one dashboard
hero.subtitle: Log in via Yandex or Google, connect Zigbee2MQTT and immediately see the devices. Collect zones from them, monitor the readings and enable automation when you are ready.

secondary.title: Get started in a few steps
secondary.text: Create a connection, run Zigbee2MQTT and add the first device. Zones, plants and automations can be set up later at your own pace.

points.title: Connection
points.text: The new installation works directly, and the local bridge retains the existing Home Assistant and MQTT.

points.title: Auto discovery
points.text: Devices and available metrics appear from Zigbee2MQTT automatically.

points.title: Zones and control
points.text: Name zones, assign devices, and control only proven functions.

items.title: Unified overview
items.text: Zones, device states and latest readings in one dashboard.

items.title: Sensor history
items.text: Track temperature, humidity and other metrics exposed by Zigbee2MQTT over time.

items.title: Manual control
items.text: Commands are only available for control capabilities that the device has advertised and enabled by GrowerHub.

items.title: Automation
items.text: Light schedule, climate thresholds with hysteresis and watering with customizable protective limits.

early_access: GrowerHub grew out of extensive practical experience in greenhouse automation. We have brought monitoring, control and clear automation scenarios together in one platform that is already free to use without a card. If you need help or support for a new device model, message us in Telegram — we can help in Russian or English.
